SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.util

Class MessageSerializer

java.lang.Object
edu.yu.cs.com3810.util.MessageSerializer
public class MessageSerializer extends Object
Utility class for serializing and deserializing Message objects to and from JSON strings for transmission over Netty TCP channels.

Uses a single shared ObjectMapper instance (thread-safe after configuration). The key design decision is that deserialization is fully generic — it reads the messageType field from the JSON (the fully-qualified payload class name stored by Message.getMessageType()) and uses Jackson's JavaType system to reconstruct Message<ConcretePayloadType> without any per-model switch statements. Adding a new model class requires zero changes here.

Wire format

Every message is a JSON object with the following top-level fields: 

 {
   "messageId":   "550e8400-...",
   "topic":       "COMMAND",
   "senderId":    "coordinator-1",
   "messageType": "smarthome.models.Command",
   "timestamp":   "2024-01-01T12:00:00Z",
   "payload": {
     ... fields of the concrete payload class ...
   }
 }

Control frames

REGISTER and SUBSCRIBE frames are NOT Message objects — they are simple JSON control envelopes used only during channel setup: 
 { "frameType": "REGISTER",  "nodeId": "coordinator-1" }
 { "frameType": "SUBSCRIBE", "nodeId": "coordinator-1", "topic": "COMMAND" }
These are handled separately in MessageBusServerHandler.channelRead0(io.netty.channel.ChannelHandlerContext, java.lang.String) by inspecting the frameType field before attempting full Message deserialization.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Message<?>
    deserialize(String json)
    Deserializes a JSON string back into a Message<?> with the correct concrete payload type.

    getMapper()
    Returns the shared ObjectMapper for use in other parts of the system that need JSON processing (e.g. the coordinator's request handler).
    static String
    registerFrame(String nodeId)
    Builds a REGISTER control frame JSON string.

    serialize(Message<T> message)
    Serializes a Message of any payload type to a JSON string.
    static String
    subscribeFrame(String nodeId, String topic)
    Builds a SUBSCRIBE control frame JSON string.

  • Method Details

    • serialize

      public static <T> String serialize(Message<T> message)
      Serializes a Message of any payload type to a JSON string.

      The resulting string includes a messageType field carrying the fully-qualified class name of the payload, which is used during deserialization to reconstruct the correct generic type.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the payload type
      Parameters:
      message - the message to serialize; must not be null
      Returns:
      a JSON string representation of the message
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - wrapping JacksonException if the message cannot be serialized if serialization fails

    • deserialize

      public static Message<?> deserialize(String json)
      Deserializes a JSON string back into a Message<?> with the correct concrete payload type.

      Reads the messageType field from the raw JSON to determine the payload class, then constructs a parameterized JavaType for Message<PayloadClass> and deserializes in one pass. No switch statement or per-type handling required.

      Parameters:
      json - the JSON string to deserialize; must not be null or empty
      Returns:
      a fully typed Message<?> with the payload deserialized to its original concrete type
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the JSON is malformed, the messageType class cannot be found on the classpath, or deserialization otherwise fails

    • registerFrame

      public static String registerFrame(String nodeId)
      Builds a REGISTER control frame JSON string. Sent by a component immediately after its Netty channel connects to the Message Bus server, before any DATA frames.

      Wire format: {"frameType":"REGISTER","nodeId":"<nodeId>"}

      Parameters:
      nodeId - the ID of the component registering itself
      Returns:
      a JSON string for the REGISTER control frame

    • subscribeFrame

      public static String subscribeFrame(String nodeId, String topic)
      Builds a SUBSCRIBE control frame JSON string. Sent by a component after registering, once for each topic it wants to receive messages on.

      Wire format: {"frameType":"SUBSCRIBE","nodeId":"<nodeId>","topic":"<TOPIC>"}

      Parameters:
      nodeId - the ID of the subscribing component
      topic - the topic name to subscribe to (e.g. "COMMAND")
      Returns:
      a JSON string for the SUBSCRIBE control frame

    • getMapper

      public static tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper getMapper()
      Returns the shared ObjectMapper for use in other parts of the system that need JSON processing (e.g. the coordinator's request handler). The mapper is fully configured and thread-safe.
      Returns:
      the shared ObjectMapper instance
